data.title: Advanced Threat Protection
data.description: Employs multi-layered threat protection to safeguard against cyber attacks.

data.title: SSL/TLS Encryption
data.description: Ensures encrypted communications between users and the server.

data.title: Regular Security Audits
data.description: Conducts frequent security audits to identify and mitigate vulnerabilities.

data.title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
data.description: Enhances user security through additional identity verification measures.
data.technical_spec: 2FA options through SMS and authenticator apps.

data.title: Data Breach Response Protocols
data.description: Has well-defined protocols for identifying, responding to, and communicating data breaches.
data.technical_spec: Incident response team and user notification systems.
